background.origin: Saiki's younger sister. While her brother learned magic, she learned survival skills in back alleys. Pickpocketing and lockpicking were her school.
background.motivation: Escape poverty by finding treasure with her brother. 'If brother lights the way, I'll open the path from the shadows.'
background.personality: Rough-spoken with quick hands, but still throws tantrums in front of her brother at fifteen — the most dependable little sister in the world.

relationships.saiki: Brother. The most precious person in the world
relationships.noel: Same-age friend. They bicker but understand each other

appearance.hair: Short messy hair tied back loosely
appearance.face: Sharp, mischievous eyes with a confident smirk. Tough exterior but youthful softness.
appearance.outfit: Dark leather street clothes — not proper armor, street urchin's practical outfit with many hidden pockets
appearance.notable: Dual-wields two small daggers. Lockpicking tools hanging from belt.
